content:
Read what you wrote for the Week 1 Warm-Up assignment. Was it interesting? Does it sound like your voice? Could it have been better? Write your thoughts in 250 words on what you wrote.

Save your completed Week 2 Weekly Writing Warm-Up using the proper naming convention.
Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 5 minutes.

Warm-up Rubric

You've already rated students with this rubric. Any major changes could affect their assessment results.
Warm-up Rubric
Criteria Ratings Pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeEvaluation
Weekly Writing Warmup assessment criteria.
100 pts
Full Credit
Submission reflects completion of the guidelines and prompts outlined in the instructions and the required time spent writing.
50 pts
Partial Credit
Submission reflects on at least half of the guidelines and prompts outlined in the instructions and the required time spent writing.
0 pts
No Credit
